summary: auth logout now also warns when GOODREADS_GRAPHQL_TOKEN is still exported, mirroring the existing GOODREADS_GOODREADS_COOKIE_SESSION warning (both JSON note and human prose).
reason: config.Load() re-populates Config.GraphQLToken from GOODREADS_GRAPHQL_TOKEN after logout (so rating set/clear keep working), so a still-exported token meant the user thought they logged out but rating mutations still authenticated. Logout warned about the cookie env var but not this one.
validated_outcome: With GOODREADS_GRAPHQL_TOKEN set, `auth logout` prints '... env var is still set; unset it to fully log out.' and the --json envelope's note lists it; both env vars are joined when both are set.
